strengths: Meets 15+ years requirement with 20 years of software engineering experience across web, mobile, desktop, and infrastructure domains
Demonstrated entrepreneurial capability through 10-year founding and maintenance of GISCollective, an open-source geo-data platform
Recent exposure to AI infrastructure at re:cinq (AI-agent frameworks, MCP code generators), showing emerging familiarity with the required domain
concerns: Limited formal AI/ML expertise—first direct AI infrastructure role was only 6 months, insufficient to establish 'recognized expertise in AI' as required by the role
Unexplained 8-month career gap since October 2025, raising stability and commitment concerns for a director-level partnership role
No demonstrated experience in cloud platform strategy, strategic customer advisory, thought leadership, or the innovation-focused endeavors key to this position

key_factors.factor: Strong technical foundation and entrepreneurial track record

response.justification: Szabo has solid technical depth and meets the minimum experience requirement, with credible entrepreneurial credentials. However, his profile misaligns with the Principal Engineer—AI Strategy role. His AI expertise is nascent (one 6-month engagement) rather than recognized, his strategic advisory and thought leadership experience is absent, and his current career gap raises concerns about commitment. The role demands established AI expertise, customer advisory capability, and demonstrated innovation vision—areas where his resume shows minimal evidence. He would be better suited for a senior IC role in an area with deeper, longer-term experience.
